gpqa.label: GPQA
gpqa.sectionHeading: Public GPQA Diamond values across model families.
gpqa.sectionCopy: Model names link to the release page, and the source column links to the page or paper where the GPQA Diamond value was published.

openai.label: OpenAI
openai.description: Benchmark-first fossil sheet for GPQA across OpenAI GPT-family releases with public GPQA Diamond records.
openai.plotAlt: A botanical scientific fossil for GPQA in which OpenAI GPT-family models branch from one shared root and rise to their measured GPQA Diamond values.

anthropic.label: Anthropic
anthropic.description: Benchmark-first fossil sheet for GPQA across Anthropic Claude-family releases with public GPQA Diamond records.
anthropic.plotAlt: A botanical scientific fossil for GPQA in which Anthropic Claude-family models branch from one shared root and rise to their measured GPQA Diamond values.
